title: Senior Software Engineer - IndiaMart Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - IndiaMart Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
